descriptions.value: One item may be purchased from this Terminal. This Terminal will present multiple offers for the following items:
descriptions.name: attribute

descriptions.value: Versatile but expensive, the German-made MP7 SMG is the perfect choice for high-impact close-range combat. It has been painted using different shades of yellow. Here's some new material...
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. These Dual Berettas have been painted with striking green and silver colors. The grips are finished with a ceramic top coat. They command respect, although I can't say the same for you... - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. Three brightly colored, hungry carnivorous plants have been custom painted on each Dual Beretta. Help them grow up big and strong
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. Its green base is emblazoned with the number 36. Technically it's four cats, but who's counting?
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. It has been spray-painted using cardboard cutouts, fine mesh, and palm leaves as stencils.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Items in this container can be rented.
descriptions.name: attr: can open for rental

descriptions.value: Often imitated but never equaled, the iconic MP5 is perhaps the most versatile and popular SMG in the world. This SD variant features an integrated silencer, making an already formidable weapon whisper-quiet. A red pattern of offset X's has been applied. It's a bit much, but isn't that the point? - Imogen, Arms Dealer In Training
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. Red, tan, and green monkeys adorn this custom painted MAC-10. Spunky monkeys!
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Manufactured in Switzerland, the cutting-edge MP9 SMG is an ergonomic polymer weapon favored by private security firms. It has been spray-painted with a worn, blue pattern. That's gonna leave a mark!
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. A custom paint job has been applied which can only be described as "black on black on slate black". "Call a doctor, they're gonna need one"
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Sticker: The Guru
descriptions.name: sticker_info

descriptions.value: A strong open-area LMG, the M249 is the perfect choice for players willing to trade a slow fire rate for increased accuracy and a high ammo capacity. A green and grey hydrographic pattern has been applied. "We weren't sure if we were the ambushers... or the ambushees"
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The R8 Revolver delivers a highly accurate and powerful round at the expense of a lengthy trigger-pull. Firing rapidly by fanning the hammer may be the best option when point-blank stopping power is required. The grip has been painted with a plum-colored acrylic pour pattern. A gentle pour
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been custom painted with a marbled green base and finished with gold and red accents. They don't pay you enough to carry that, but I will - Valeria Jenner, Revolutionary
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: This item commemorates the 2020 CS:GO Regional Major Rankings.
descriptions.name: attribute

descriptions.value:
This capsule contains a single Paper, Holographic, Foil, or Gold 2020 RMR participant sticker.

50% of the proceeds from the sale of this capsule support the included organizations.

That sticker can be applied to any weapon you own and can be scraped to look more worn. You can scrape the same sticker multiple times, making it a bit more worn each time, until it is removed from the weapon.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. A yellow pattern has been applied and finished with silver accents. ZZZZZAP!
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. A silver hydrographic pattern has been applied and finished with red accents. Sterling qualities
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. A grayscale pattern featuring sharp, angular designs has been applied. Unflinching
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: This item commemorates the StarLadder Budapest 2025 CS2 Major Championship.
descriptions.name: attribute

descriptions.value: This sticker can be applied to any weapon you own and can be scraped to look more worn. You can scrape the same sticker multiple times, making it a bit more worn each time, until it is removed from the weapon.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. These Dual Berettas have been painted with striking green and silver colors. The grips are finished with a ceramic top coat. They command respect, although I can't say the same for you... - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: An ideal pistol for the Terrorist on the move, the Tec-9 is lethal in close quarters and features a high magazine capacity. It has been custom painted to appear handmade, from the grip to the welding on the receiver. You have insurance, right?
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: This item commemorates the BLAST.tv Paris 2023 CS:GO Championship.
descriptions.name: attribute

descriptions.value: This sticker can be applied to any weapon you own and can be scraped to look more worn. You can scrape the same sticker multiple times, making it a bit more worn each time, until it is removed from the weapon.

descriptions.value: This sticker was autographed by professional player Cai Ashley Watson playing for Into The Breach at the BLAST.tv Paris 2023 CS:GO Major Championship.

descriptions.value: This sticker was autographed by professional player William Cameron Merriman playing for Fnatic at the BLAST.tv Paris 2023 CS:GO Major Championship.

descriptions.value: This is a commemorative Premier Medal awarded for your active participation in Premier Season Three.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Items in this container can be rented.
descriptions.name: attr: can open for rental

descriptions.value: or an Exceedingly Rare Special Item!
descriptions.name: attribute

descriptions.value: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been custom painted with a solid blue slide and finished with gold accents. It is rare that beauty is so obvious
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Charm: Hang Loose
descriptions.name: keychain_info

descriptions.value: This item commemorates the StarLadder Budapest 2025 CS2 Major Championship.
descriptions.name: attribute

descriptions.value:
This is a commemorative StarLadder Budapest 2025 CS2 Major Championship Coin which tracks your progress throughout the event, provides full access to the Budapest 2025 Pick'Em Challenge, Steam.tv chat flairs, coin challenges, and unlimited graffiti opportunities in-game for the duration of the event.

Upgrade your Budapest 2025 Coin by completing coin challenges. Earn a Souvenir Token every time you upgrade your coin.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The Storage Unit allows you to store up to 1,000 of your surplus items which would otherwise exceed inventory limit. At any time you can move items from your inventory into the Storage Unit, retrieve items back into your inventory, or you can just use it to organize your collectibles.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: This item features StatTrak™ technology, which tracks certain statistics when equipped by its owner.
descriptions.name: stattrak_type

descriptions.value: *Stats for this item will reset when used in Steam Trading or Community Market
descriptions.name: stattrak_warn

descriptions.value: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. It has been given a blue patina which has been polished off parts of the slide to result in a graphic flame design. KNOCK KNOCK
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: As expensive as it is powerful, the Desert Eagle is an iconic pistol that is difficult to master but surprisingly accurate at long range. Its white and black design feels both sterile and futuristic. Same technology, now available in a smaller form factor
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Sticker: Snowfall (Glitter), G2 Esports (Foil) | Austin 2025
descriptions.name: sticker_info

descriptions.value: Charm: Lil' Zen
descriptions.name: keychain_info

descriptions.value: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. A red and black mesh hydrographic has been applied. Not so harmful after all...
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Sticker: Boom Trail, Scorch Loop, High Heat, Winding Scorch, Winding Scorch
descriptions.name: sticker_info

descriptions.value: This item features StatTrak™ technology, which tracks certain statistics when equipped by its owner.
descriptions.name: stattrak_type

descriptions.value: *Stats for this item will reset when used in Steam Trading or Community Market
descriptions.name: stattrak_warn

descriptions.value: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted with a design depicting fish swimming into a person's mouth using an orange and black color palette. Gulp, gulp, gulp
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Charm Detachment Pack will give you 3 Charm Detachments. Each Charm Detachment allows you to detach one applied charm. The detached charm will appear in your inventory.
descriptions.name: description

7378656497_188530139.name: Music Kit | Selective Response, No Love Only Pleasure
7378656497_188530139.market_hash_name: Music Kit | Selective Response, No Love Only Pleasure
7378656497_188530139.market_name: Music Kit | Selective Response, No Love Only Pleasure
7378656497_188530139.market_listing_bucket_group_name: Music Kit | Selective Response, No Love Only Pleasure

descriptions.value:
This Music Kit will replace all of the music in the game and is shareable with anyone you are playing with. It also includes an MVP Anthem that plays for everyone in the match when you are MVP.

The Music Kit replaces the following music:
- Main Menu
- Round Start and End
- Map Objective
- Ten Second Warning
- Death Camera
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Drive your desires with this dynamic, high-energy music kit from American techno icon Selective Response. Charged up and ready for action.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: This is a commemorative Premier Medal awarded for your active participation in Premier Season Two.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: The SSG08 bolt-action is a low-damage but very cost-effective sniper rifle, making it a smart choice for early-round long-range marksmanship. It has been painted by airbrushing transparent paints that fade together over a chrome base coat. This isn't just a weapon, it's a conversation piece - Imogen, Arms Dealer In Training
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Stable and resistant to most physical shocks, this improvised plastic explosive has a detonation velocity of over 8,000 meters per second when ignited.
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: Charm: Backsplash
descriptions.name: keychain_info

descriptions.value: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been painted with a chrome base coat and candied in transparent silver anodized effect paint. There is beauty in simplicity - Franz Kriegeld, Phoenix Tactician
descriptions.name: description

descriptions.value: A less expensive option among the terrorist-exclusive assault rifles, the Galil AR is a serviceable weapon in medium to long-range combat. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a black and white color scheme. For when combat is a black tie affair
